title: Koali’s Custom Block Pack
body:
### 🛠️ **A Mod to Be Modified!** 🎨

### ⚠️ IF YOU ALREADY USED VERSION 1.0.1, WITH THE NEW VERSION THE BLOCKS WILL DISAPPEAR (NEW MOD ID) ⚠️

Want to create your own decorative Minecraft blocks? 🏗️ This is the mod for you! Just change the texture of the blocks, and you'll have **2500 custom blocks, stairs, slabs, corners and vertical slabs** (200 each) in-game! 🔥✨

![THE NEW NEW ONES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/029de1a2cbd0a521bd3b1c2ff5c46460ac4bfa60.png)

Includes a resource pack template!

![Texture Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71227cd021b630a5cf2e29f33f947eca0100ae3a.png)

Change the texture and you're done!

### 🏗️ For Builders and Decorators! 🎨

If you are a **builder** and want to **add more blocks** or just **decorate your builds**, this is for you! ✨

### 📌 Frequently Asked Questions:

❓ What is this mod useful for?
- 🏗️ This mod will help you add custom blocks for decorative purposes.  

🎨 How do I change the textures?
- 🖌️ Use the texture pack template and replace the current textures with your own!  

🔨 Do the blocks have crafting?  
- ❌ No, these are purely decorative.
